branch_activity_note.note: The earlier codex/worldclass-closure-20260414-1212 remediation was superseded after an external merge advanced main to 48f32775. This manifest governs the follow-on closure branch created from the advanced main head.

runtime_authority_replacement: RegistryService contract fallback and runtime authority checks

closed_p1_findings.finding: Offline form issuance accepted caller-authored template/schema metadata without authoritative server validation.
closure_evidence: FormIssuanceCommandService loads template revision and schema version from DB
caller manifest hash mismatch is rejected

closed_p1_findings.finding: Submission attempt validation state was caller-driven.
closure_evidence: EqmsFormExecutionService validates attempt hashes, duplicates, and carrier manifest

closed_p1_findings.finding: Evidence finalization retry safety was not fully atomic or collision-proof.
closure_evidence: EvidenceFinalizationService persists canonical rows inside a transaction when available
signature idempotency collisions are checked for payload equivalence

closed_p1_findings.finding: Publication withdraw/supersede lacked persisted worker trail and could trust caller authority payloads.
closure_evidence: PublicationMonitorService reloads change authority from persisted publication/version/order rows
processQueuedAction records publication attempts and receipts
PublicationStateService requires released change order id for withdraw/supersede

closed_p1_findings.finding: MES digital-thread repository probe did not prove migration 122 context columns were present.
closure_evidence: PostgresManufacturingEventRepository checks information_schema for required 5M/context columns

closed_p1_findings.finding: Generated registry projections lived under controlled source.
closure_evidence: repo boundary scanner reports P0/P1 clean
canonical registry/runtime authority focused tests pass
